mapper.sql: id, owner_user_id, provider_code, protocol, channel_name, base_url, api_key_cipher, default_model, extra_json, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM llm_channel WHERE owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO llm_channel (owner_user_id, provider_code, protocol, channel_name, base_url, api_key_cipher, default_model, extra_json, status) VALUES (#{ownerUserId}, #{providerCode}, #{protocol}, #{channelName}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKeyCipher}, #{defaultModel}, #{extraJson}, #{status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM llm_channel WHERE id = #{id} AND owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}
